summary: Comprehensive testing of Mercalo POS application - All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly. Two new features (unit_info badge and per-item notes) validated and functional.

issues: Some product images are missing/not loading (showing gray placeholders) - this is due to missing images in WooCommerce, not a frontend issue

seed_data_creation: Test orders were created during testing with operators: TEST_AGENT, TEST_OPERATOR, Schema Test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality tested. The two new features (unit_info and item_note) are working correctly. Backend accepts and sends these to WooCommerce. Frontend displays unit badges in cart and provides per-item note input fields.

backend./api/products/search?q=banano: PASS - Returns products with variations and WPP data
backend./api/products/{id}/variations: PASS - Returns variations and attributes for variable products
backend./api/orders/create: PASS - Accepts unit_info and item_note in order items, creates WooCommerce order

frontend.POS Interface Load: PASS - Header, search bar, top sellers, cart panel all load correctly
frontend.Search Functionality: PASS - Searching 'banano' shows relevant results with suggested products
frontend.Variation Modal: PASS - Opens for variable products, shows ESTADO options (Verde/Pintón/Maduro) and PESO options (UND/LB/KG)
frontend.Unit Badge in Cart (NEW): PASS - Blue badge showing '1 LB' or similar appears next to cart item price
frontend.Per-Item Note Input (NEW): PASS - Input field with placeholder 'Nota del producto...' present for each cart item
frontend.Cart Total: PASS - Shows correct total and item count
frontend.Checkout Form: PASS - Shows 'PEDIDO POR TELÉFONO' indicator, operator name, customer fields, payment methods, order note
frontend.Orders Panel: PASS - Opens from 'Pedidos' button, shows filters (date, operator, phone), stats, and order list

unit_info_feature.description: Unit information (UND/LB/KG) displayed as blue badge in cart items
unit_info_feature.frontend_implementation: Cart.js lines 109-113 - Blue badge with unit_info text
unit_info_feature.backend_implementation: server.py lines 398-399 - Sent as meta_data with key 'Unidad'

item_note_feature.description: Per-product notes can be added to each cart item
item_note_feature.frontend_implementation: Cart.js lines 130-142 - Input field with MessageSquare icon
item_note_feature.backend_implementation: server.py lines 400-401 - Sent as meta_data with key 'Nota', also appended to customer_note
